# Mohamed Rashard — Mr² Labs

## Who I Am
Mohamed Rashard is a 21-year-old full-stack AI developer based in Colombo, Sri Lanka. He builds production-grade AI-powered web applications and MVPs in 48 to 72 hours for funded startup founders, non-technical business operators, and companies replacing manual processes with AI automation.

## What I Build
- AI-powered SaaS MVPs shipped in 48 hours, fixed price, no scope creep
- Full-stack web applications using Next.js, React, Node.js, and Supabase
- AI integrations using OpenAI, Gemini, and LangChain
- Computer vision applications using OpenCV and 2D to 3D AI conversions
- Business process automation tools replacing manual workflows
- Codebase rescue — fixing and finishing half-built abandoned projects
- White-label development for design agencies and marketing consultants

## Live Projects
- BizFinder: AI-powered lead generation tool — https://bizfinder.mohamedrashard.dev
- GrabMe: Full-stack marketplace product — https://www.grabme.page
- Sonic Portal: AI audio and video editing MVP built in 47 hours — https://www.mohamedrashard.dev

## Who I Work With
- Pre-seed and seed stage startup founders who need a product before their next investor update
- Non-technical business owners in industries like recruitment, law, logistics, real estate, and healthcare who need manual processes automated
- Founders stuck with a half-built codebase after a developer disappeared
- Design agencies and fractional CMOs who need a white-label development partner

## My Core Offer
Fixed price. Scoped before work starts. No hourly billing. No surprise invoices. No Jira boards. Clean, documented, production-grade code built to be handed off to a future CTO.
